data.title: Chainlink and Partners Successfully Complete Cross-Chain DvP Test Transaction
data.description: According to Odaily, Chainlink, Kinexys, a blockchain business under JPMorgan, and Ondo Finance, a platform for tokenizing real-world assets, have announced the successful completion of a cross-chain Delivery versus Payment (DvP) test transaction. In this transaction, the Kinexys digital payment network provided a permissioned blockchain network for account deposits used in payment settlements. Ondo's blockchain offered a next-generation Layer 1 blockchain designed to expand the tokenization of real-world assets, along with its flagship product, the tokenized U.S. Treasury Fund (OUSG). The DvP solution coordinated asset and payment movements, with end-to-end support provided by the Chainlink Runtime Environment (CRE).

data.title: Tether Announces Launch of QuantumVerse Automatic Computer
data.description:
According to Odaily, Tether has announced the upcoming launch of the QuantumVerse Automatic Computer (QVAC), a smart development platform designed for both humans and machines. This platform enables highly scalable AI applications and agents to operate directly on local devices, eliminating the need for centralized services and cloud infrastructure. This approach aims to protect users from corporate access to private user data.

Tether is set to introduce its first AI applications based on QVAC, focusing on privacy protection and autonomous sovereignty. The initial applications include QVAC/Translate, which allows for rapid transcription and translation of text, documents, images, and audio directly on devices without relying on cloud services. Another application, QVAC/Health, is a private health tracker that fully localizes sensitive health data.

Additionally, Tether plans to open-source a comprehensive software development kit in the coming months. This will enable developers to easily build, deploy, and scale their own QVAC agents on any device.

data.title: Squads receives strategic investment from Haun Ventures and plans to launch a stablecoin native account
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Solana Ecosystem Multi-Signature Protocol Squads announced that it has received strategic investment from Haun Ventures, and the specific amount has not been disclosed. In addition, Squads also announced that it will soon launch the stablecoin native account Altitude, allowing companies to open and fund US dollar accounts without relying on traditional banks or US entities. (Blockworks)

data.title: A whale transferred 1 million TRUMP to Binance 30 minutes ago and made a profit of $2.51 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Ember, a whale who bought TRUMP at a recent low point transferred 1 million TRUMP (US$13.37 million) to Binance 30 minutes ago, making a profit of US$2.51 million.
He withdrew these 1 million TRUMP from Binance on 5/6 at a price of US$10.86, which is near the lowest point since the TRUMP dinner plan.
30 minutes ago, he transferred these 1 million TRUMP to Binance at a price of US$13.37, and finally realized a profit of US$2.51 million.

data.description:
Key Insights: Amid a general market shift, BNB price is in the spotlight as it eyes a potential breakout on a key utility boost. Exchange-traded fund (ETF) issuer VanEck has inked a strategic partnership with Securitize, a leader in Real-World Asset (RWA) tokenization.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/14/bnb-price-eyes-700-breakout-amid-vaneck-tokenized-fund-launch/

data.title: Mira Network was selected into CB Insights' 2025 AI 100 list
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: AI infrastructure Mira Network announced on the X platform that it has been selected for the CB Insights "2025 AI 100 List". Mira mainly provides tools for developers to help users build more reliable AI-driven applications through a decentralized verification mechanism.

data.title: Chainlink Launches Bank Payment Channels to Tokenized Asset Market with JPMorgan’s Kinexys and Ondo Finance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Chainlink, Kinexys, the blockchain business of JPMorgan Chase, and Ondo Finance, a real-world asset tokenization platform, jointly announced today the successful completion of a cross-chain DvP (deposit-versus-payment) test transaction. In this transaction, the Kinexys digital payment network provided a permissioned blockchain network to deposit accounts used for payment settlement; Ondo Blockchain provided the next-generation L1 blockchain specifically built for scaling real-world asset tokenization and its flagship product, the Tokenized U.S. Treasury Fund (OUSG). The DvP solution coordinates asset and payment movements and is supported end-to-end by the Chainlink Runtime Environment (CRE).

data.title: Ethereum retakes 10% market share, but ETH bulls shouldn't celebrate yet
data.description:
Key takeaways:Ethereum’s market dominance has hit overbought RSI levels not seen since May 2021, historically followed by major pullbacks. ETH/USD is showing a bearish divergence on the four-hour chart, hinting at a potential 10–15% price correction. Despite the near-term risks, some analysts view a pullback as a “buy-the-dip” setup before a possible move toward $3,500–$3,800. Ether (ETH) has surged over 50% month-to-date in May, vastly outperforming the broader crypto market’s 15

data.title: No more Bitcoin to buy, BTC miners halt sales as price spikes
data.description:
Bitcoin’s recent price surge to $103,000 has triggered a shift in miner behavior, who have swapped their long-running selloff trend for accumulation. Mining production costs have also soared, and with small investors re-entering the market, the largest crypto by market cap might witness a continued rally over the next couple of weeks. According to blockchain […]

data.title: Bitget has launched U-based MYX and LAUNCHCOIN perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Bitget announced that it has launched U-based MYX and LAUNCHCOIN perpetual contracts, with leverage ranges of 1-20 times, and contract trading BOT will be opened simultaneously.

data.title: Top South Korean presidential hopefuls support legalizing Bitcoin ETFs
data.description:
South Korea could soon follow Hong Kong in legalizing spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs), as the country’s top presidential candidates express pro-crypto positions. However, some industry observers remain cautious about the likelihood of near-term regulatory change. “All three major South Korean presidential candidates support #Bitcoin ETFs and institutional investment,” Ki Young Ju, the founder and CEO of onchain data platform CryptoQuant, wrote in a May 14 X post. Currently, Bitcoin ETFs and institutional crypto investments are banned in South Korea, meaning that “100% [of the] volume comes from retail,” Ju added
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/south-korean-presidential-candidates-support-bitcoin-etfs?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Antalpha plans to list on Nasdaq, IPO price is $12.80, plans to raise nearly $50 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Antalpha, a crypto financial technology company that focuses on serving Bitcoin mining companies, announced that it will issue 3.85 million shares of common stock at a price of $12.80 per share, with the stock code "ANTA", and will be listed on the Nasdaq Global Market today. The IPO is expected to raise approximately $49.3 million, and up to $56.7 million after the over-allotment is exercised. The proceeds will be used for product development, global expansion, customer financing support, and investment in Bitcoin and digital gold. (GlobeNewswire)

data.title: ETH/USDT,BTC/USDT and SOL/USDT Lead Binance USD-M Perpetual Futures Market in Trading Volume Over the Past 24 Hours
data.description: According to Binance Futures data, over the past 24 hours, the ETH/USDT, BTC/USDT, SOL/USDT, XRP/USDT and DOGE/USDT trading pairs led the USD-M perpetual futures market in trading volume.ETH/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 1.55, funding rate: 0.0033%.BTC/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 0.68, funding rate: 0.0059%.SOL/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 1.57, funding rate: 0.0095%.XRP/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.75, funding rate: 0.0100%.DOGE/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.5, funding rate: 0.0052%.

data.title: Coinbase CEO publicly invites former DOGE employees to join
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Brian Armstrong, CEO of Coinbase, has issued an "open recruitment invitation" to former employees of the "Department of Government Efficiency" (DOGE) on social platforms, providing an accelerated recruitment channel. This move stems from a popular FOX News interview clip, in which former DOGE member and Harvard dropout Ethan Shaotran talked about the social exclusion he encountered due to his work in the agency. Armstrong said that he welcomes these technical talents who have served the country to "join Coinbase next to build a more efficient financial system." (CoinDesk)

data.title: Crypto-Friendly Lawmakers Push to Resurrect Stalled Stablecoin Bill
data.description:
TL;DR Senators from both parties are reviving a stalled stablecoin bill that recently failed to advance in the Senate. Republican Bill Hagerty and Democrat Angela Alsobrooks are leading efforts to pass the legislation before the Memorial Day recess. The crypto industry, led by figures like Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong, is pushing for legislative progress and. . .

data.title: JPMorgan Completes Transaction Settlement on Public Ledger with Chainlink and Ondo Finance
data.description: According to Odaily, JPMorgan has successfully settled a transaction on a public ledger with the assistance of cryptocurrency companies Chainlink and Ondo Finance. The financial giant has adopted what many in the cryptocurrency sector refer to as a 'walled garden' approach, creating a private network accessible only to its clients.

data.title: Fed Vice Chair Jefferson Discusses Policy Rates and Inflation Concerns
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve Vice Chair Jefferson stated that the current moderately restrictive policy rates are well-positioned to address changes in economic development. He noted that tariffs could lead to increased inflation, but it remains uncertain whether this impact will be temporary or persistent.
